span.p: Is the ITC adder stack fully reflected at confirmed eligibility?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Confirm energy community and domestic content eligibility - adders may close the gap

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is the interconnection upgrade cost allocation final or estimated?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Model upgrade sensitivity - IRR may recover if study comes in below estimate

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Can the project be resized or reoriented to reduce upgrade allocation?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Resize or reconfigure - reduce MW load on the constrained interconnection point

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is the PPA rate negotiable or is a higher-value offtake structure available?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Renegotiate PPA price or switch to higher-value offtake structure

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Abandon or sell development rights - project is not viable at current parameters
